span.p: Cluster-wide baseline (Kyverno-enforced)

div.style: color: rgb(124, 45, 18) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
F6: NetworkPolicy default-deny
+ Istio mTLS STRICT mọi ns

div.style: color: rgb(124, 45, 18) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
F4: etcd encryption-at-rest từ P5
+ sealed-secrets (Vault vòng harden)

div.style: color: rgb(124, 45, 18) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
F7: chỉ load model ĐÃ SIGN (cosign)
MLflow/Triton pickle = RCE vector

div.style: color: rgb(7, 89, 133) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 🌐 End user (Internet)

div.style: color: rgb(7, 89, 133) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 👤 Operator (bạn)

div.style: color: rgb(124, 45, 18) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Istio gateway
mTLS STRICT · TLS cert-manager

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
face-detect serving (KServe)
F2: AuthorizationPolicy allow-list
+ RequestAuthentication OIDC
+ rate-limit · KEDA cap max-replica

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Keycloak (login)
F3: redirect_uri CHÍNH XÁC, cấm wildcard
brute-force detection · admin console KHÔNG public

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ArgoCD UI
pin ≥3.1.2 · rotate admin token

span.p:
❌ TUYỆT ĐỐI KHÔNG để admin UI trên public ingress
(ArgoCD ≈ cluster-admin; token built-in không hết hạn)
